author: Antigravity
install_msg: Thanks for installing QuoteGame! Load it and use `[p]quotegame` to set up.
name: QuoteGame
short: A weekly fill-in-the-blank quote game for your server.
description: Binds to a channel and posts a fill-in-the-blank quote game every week. Users submit 1-word answers and vote on the best one.
end_user_data_statement: This cog temporarily stores Discord user IDs to keep track of game submissions during an active game.
